scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run dev --workspace=tinyurl-api
scripts.dev:kgs: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run dev --workspace=kgs
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
